todo_subtitle: let AI finish them for you
todo_composer_placeholder: Write something to get done — press Enter to hand it to AI
todo_empty_hint: Try one of these — press Enter and AI takes over:
todo_empty_example_1: Sort this week's email, mark the ones I need to reply to
todo_empty_example_2: Summarize these meeting notes into 5 bullet points
todo_empty_example_3: Pull invoice amounts out of this PDF
todo_note_placeholder: Context, goals, constraints, desired output format…
